description: You are a librarian setting up the new Greenfield Public Library website on a WordPress site running the Twenty Twenty-One theme. Create and publish six pages: 'Welcome to Greenfield Library' with a brief welcome paragraph, 'Library News' with no content, 'Catalog' with a sentence about searching the catalog, 'Digital Collections' with a sentence about e-books and media, 'Events & Programs' with a sentence about upcoming events, and 'About Us' with a sentence about the library's history. Configure the site to use 'Welcome to Greenfield Library' as a static homepage and 'Library News' as the posts page. Create a menu named 'Main Navigation' containing all six pages and assign it to the Primary menu location. Do not install any plugins.
